title: VIKAS MELAMINE TEA CUP SET OF 6 PIECES SMALL

Choose from a vibrant palette of six striking colors—Red, Yellow, Blue, Orange, Black, and White—to perfectly match your kitchen decor. Made from high-quality, break-resistant melamine, these small cups are lightweight, easy to maintain, and ideal for both daily household use and cozy gatherings.

title: Modern Minimalist Wave Wall Clock | Silent Decorative Wall Clock for Living Room, Bedroom & Office
body_html:
Enhance your interiors with this elegant Modern Minimalist Wave Wall Clock, crafted to bring sophistication and contemporary charm to your space. Featuring a stunning layered wave pattern in monochrome tones, this designer clock perfectly blends modern aesthetics with functional décor.

The sleek rectangular design paired with premium gold hands creates a luxurious yet minimal appearance, making it an ideal statement piece for modern homes, offices, and studio spaces. Built with high-quality MDF and equipped with a silent quartz movement, this clock offers both durability and peaceful operation.

  • Easy Wall Mount Installation: Lightweight and simple to hang

This modern wave wall clock is more than a timepiece—it’s a piece of contemporary wall art. The calming layered wave design adds depth and sophistication while complementing Scandinavian, modern, minimalist, and luxury décor themes.

title: Modern Triangle Table Clock | Geometric Decorative Table Clock for Home, Office & Study Desk
body_html:

title: Rakhi with "Radhe" Engraved and Colorful Beads (1 Pc)
body_html:
Description :-

Celebrate the beautiful and emotional bond between brother and sister with this traditional Rakhi, specially designed for the auspicious festival of Raksha Bandhan. This Rakhi represents love, care, protection, and lifelong connection, making it more than just a decorative thread. Crafted with an attractive centerpiece and enhanced with decorative beads and elegant detailing, it brings a festive charm to the occasion. The soft thread ensures comfort while tying and wearing throughout the day. Its stylish yet traditional look makes it perfect for modern celebrations while maintaining cultural values. A thoughtful choice for expressing your heartfelt emotions and strengthening your sibling bond, this Rakhi adds joy and meaning to your special day.

Key Features :-

  • Beautiful and attractive designer Rakhi
  • Traditional thread symbolizing love and protection
  • Decorative beads and stylish centerpiece design
  • Soft and comfortable thread for easy tying
  • Lightweight and skin-friendly material
  • Durable and long-lasting construction
  • Perfect festive accessory for Raksha Bandhan

Ideal For :-

  • Raksha Bandhan celebration
  • Gifting to brother
  • Traditional rituals
  • Family occasions
  • Festive gifting

title: Car Air Mattress Bed Set with Inflatable Pillows and Cushions (1 Set / Mix Design)
body_html:
Car Air Mattress Bed Set with Inflatable Pillows and Cushions for Comfortable Travel Sleeping (1 Set, 1 Mattress + 2 Pillows + 1 Air Pump / Mix Deisgn)

Description:

Transform your car into a cozy sleeping space with this Car Air Mattress Bed Set. This inflatable bed is designed for ultimate comfort while traveling, camping, or road trips. Perfect for long drives, this air mattress comes with inflatable cushions and a portable electric pump, ensuring a hassle-free setup. The mattress fits most cars, allowing you to stretch out comfortably, while the additional cushions support your head and neck. Whether you’re on a road trip or taking a nap, this set guarantees a comfortable and relaxing experience.

Key Features:

  • Comfortable Sleeping Surface: Soft and supportive air mattress with built-in cushions for a restful sleep on the go.
  • Easy Inflation: Comes with a portable electric pump for quick and easy inflation in your car or home.
  • Durable Material: Made of high-quality PVC material that is strong, durable, and water-resistant.
  • Compact and Space-Saving: Easy to deflate and fold for convenient storage in your car or luggage.
  • Universal Fit: Designed to fit most car models, providing a perfect sleeping space in the back seat area.
  • Multi-Use: Great for camping, road trips, or as an emergency bed in your car.

Ideal For:

  • Travelers: Perfect for road trips or long journeys when you need a comfortable rest stop.
  • Camping Enthusiasts: An ideal accessory for camping or outdoor adventures.
  • Families: A great solution for families on the go, providing a comfortable sleep space during travel.
  • Emergency Use: Can be used in emergency situations as a temporary sleeping arrangement in your car.

  • Material: Durable PVC
  • Size: Fits most car back seats

title: Flexible Bendy Soft Pencils with Eraser – 10 Pc
body_html:
Flexible Bendy Soft Pencils with Eraser – 10 Pc Colorful Magic Bendable Pencil Set for Kids School & Birthday Return Gifts

Description:

Make writing and drawing fun with this delightful 10-piece Flexible Bendy Soft Pencil Set! These soft, twistable magic pencils bend, curl, and even tie into knots without breaking — yet still write smoothly and erase cleanly with their built-in eraser tops. Available in vibrant colors including pink, hot pink, green, purple, orange, blue, and lavender, they're perfect for school, art class, doodling, and gifting. A favorite among kids and a must-have addition to any pencil case, these flexible pencils combine creativity, function, and a touch of magic in every stroke.

Key Features:

  • Bendable & Twistable: Soft flexible body bends, curls, and even ties into knots — fun, durable, and break-resistant.
  • Built-in Eraser Top: Each pencil features an eraser cap for quick corrections without needing a separate eraser.
  • Smooth Writing: Quality lead writes clearly and works just like a regular pencil — perfect for schoolwork and sketching.
  • Vibrant 10-Color Set: Includes 10 pencils in cheerful shades — pink, hot pink, green, purple, orange, blue, and more.
  • Sharpenable: Easy to sharpen like a regular pencil for continued use.
  • Lightweight & Portable: Easy to carry in a pencil pouch, school bag, or backpack.
  • Great Return Gift: Ideal for kids' birthday parties, school events, or as small thank-you gifts.

Ideal For:

  • School Kids: Adds fun to homework, drawing, and classroom activities.
  • Young Artists: Perfect for doodling, coloring, and creative sketching at home.
  • Parents & Teachers: A practical, playful stationery option for daily school use.
  • Birthday & Return Gifts: A favorite party favor for children's birthdays and school giveaways.
  • Stationery Lovers: A quirky, fun addition to any pencil case or desk collection.

Specifications:

  • Material: Soft Flexible Plastic with Graphite Lead
  • Set Count: 10 Pieces (Pencils with Eraser Tops)

body_html:
Elevate your ethnic ensemble with these exquisite Gold-Plated Dangler Earrings. Featuring an intricate leaf-inspired stud design, they are meticulously crafted to offer a rich, authentic look that mimics solid gold.

  • Design: A sophisticated "Casting Chain Drop" style, showcasing a teardrop or leaf-shaped stud with delicate cascading bead chains.
  • Embellishments: Encrusted with shimmering White American Diamonds (AD) and a vibrant Ruby-red stone at the center for a pop of classic color.

title: Gold-Tone Fashion Pendant Necklace Set with Ruby Accents and Matching Stud Earrings
body_html:
This jewelry set is a classic example of traditional Indian "pendant-style" jewelry, often used for festive occasions or as elegant daily wear. It features a warm gold finish accented by vibrant red stones and sparkling American diamonds

Product Overview

This set typically consists of a matched necklace and earrings, designed with a focus on geometric symmetry and a "royal" aesthetic.

  • Design: The centerpiece is a circular/round pendant with a concentric ring layout. It features an inner "half-moon" or crescent motif surrounding a central ruby-colored stone.

  • Accents: The outer border of the circle is encrusted with a row of small white cubic zirconia (CZ) stones, providing a diamond-like shimmer.

  • Drop Detail: Both the pendant and the earrings feature a small pear-shaped drop with a tiny red stone, adding movement and a traditional "jhumka-lite" feel.

  • Chain Type: The necklace uses a sleek flat-link gold chain (often referred to as a "serpentine" or "flat snake" chain), which allows the pendant to sit flat against the skin.

  • Care Instructions

    To maintain the gold plating and stone brilliance, it is recommended to:

    • Avoid contact with water, perfumes, or harsh chemicals.

    • Wipe with a soft cloth after use to remove oils.

    • Store in an airtight pouch or the original jewelry box to prevent oxidation.

title: Elegant Dangle Earrings with Pearl Drops earrings

These pair beautifully with pastel-colored Lehengas, white Chikankari suits, or even a dark velvet saree to provide a striking contrast.

title: Handmade Coir Star-Shaped Bird House for Outdoor & Garden
body_html:
Transform your garden into a sanctuary for local songbirds with our uniquely designed Star-Shaped Coir Bird House. This eco-friendly nesting box is meticulously crafted from natural coconut fiber (coir), offering a sustainable and breathable environment that keeps hatchlings warm in winter and cool in summer.

The charming star silhouette is accented with vibrant synthetic grass trim around the edges and the entry hole, blending seamlessly into your garden’s natural foliage. Its rustic, earthy aesthetic adds a touch of whimsical décor to any balcony, terrace, or backyard.

Key Features & Benefits:

• Eco-Friendly Material: Made from 100% natural coir fiber, promoting sustainable gardening practices.

• Unique Star Design: Stand out from traditional square birdhouses with an eye-catching shape.

• Weather Resistant: Durable coconut husk fibers naturally withstand outdoor elements.

• Easy Hanging: Features a sturdy integrated coir loop for quick installation on tree branches or wall hooks.

• Safe Haven: The compact entry hole is specifically sized to invite small garden birds while keeping larger predators at bay.

This birdhouse is perfect for nature lovers, bird watchers, and eco-conscious gardeners looking to support local biodiversity. Whether you are an urban gardener with a small balcony or have a sprawling lawn, this star-shaped nest adds character and life to your outdoor space.

Give your feathered friends a cozy home today!
